title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
